# SOURCE — Straight Line Certification 4.0

> **ID:** SLSC4
> **Pessoa:** Jordan Belfort
> **Tipo:** COURSE (certification program)
> **Versao:** v1.0.0
> **Data Processamento:** 2026-03-18

---

## OVERVIEW

| Campo | Valor |
|-------|-------|
| Programa | Straight Line Certification 4.0 |
| Instrutor | Jordan Belfort |
| Formato | Video (mp4, webm) + Audio (mp3) + PDF transcriptions |
| Arquivos Total | 659 (505 reais + 154 stubs de 16 bytes) |
| Tamanho | ~12MB de transcricoes |
| Elementos Extraidos | 250 |

## SECOES

### Main Course (13 Modulos, 226 arquivos)
Core curriculum do Straight Line System:
- 00: Introduction (3 parts)
- 01: Cracking the Code (14 files)
- 02: Unconscious Communication (14 files)
- 03: State Management (14 files)
- 04: Advanced Tonality (12 files)
- 05: Body Language (12 files)
- 06: Prospecting (19 files)
- 07: Vision (10+ lessons + support)
- 08: Script Building (12+ lessons + support)
- 09: Standards (7+ lessons + support)
- 10: Looping (12+ lessons + support)
- 11: Beliefs (10+ lessons + support)
- 12: Customers for Life (11+ lessons + support)
- 13: Congratulations

### SLSC Weekly (12 semanas, 106 arquivos)
Weekly membership format com videos diarios:
- Weeks 1-12 parallel Main Course topics
- Mix of mp3, mp4, and PDF transcriptions
- Daily motivation + skills training
- Different content from Main Course (complementary)

### Weekly Training (105 arquivos)
Live training sessions — deepest practical content:
- E21: Sales Cycle Structure (115KB)
- E24: Overarching Equations
- E26: Getting Past the Gatekeeper
- E27: Sale Deconstruction
- E28: Inventing the Straight Line (origin story)
- E29: Syntax Part 2
- E40: How to Tell an Amazing Story
- E41: Cracking the Safe of Influence
- E42: Unconscious Communication (deep dive)
- E43: State Management
- E45: Mastering Tonality
- E47: Vision
- E48: Scripting
- E50: Looping
- E53: Staying on the Straight Line
- Weekly Intensive Training (multiple 100KB+ sessions)

### Script Builder (35 arquivos)
- SB1 through SB6 (PDF transcriptions)
- Video transcriptions of workshops
- Sample scripts for different industries

### Rebuttals Guide (1 arquivo, 160KB)
- 102-page comprehensive guide
- 50+ named rebuttal categories
- 25 variants of "Call Back"
- Industry-specific rebuttals (Solar, Forex, etc.)
- 22 Sales Tips

### Inner Game of Wealth (2 arquivos)
- PDF workbook (21+ pages)
- Video transcription
- 4 Secrets, 7 Holdbacks, Values framework

### Daily Motivations (30 arquivos)
- Daily skills training + motivation
- Tonality practice exercises
- Funnel math examples

## NOTAS

- Main Course e SLSC Weekly cobrem os MESMOS topicos mas com CONTEUDO DIFERENTE
- Main Course = "Lesson" format (structured, modular)
- SLSC Weekly = "Weekly membership" format (casual, complementary)
- Weekly Training = live sessions com Q&A, role plays, deep dives — conteudo mais rico e pratico
- 154 stubs (16 bytes) sao capas de PDF sem conteudo — ignorados na extracao
- Rebuttals Guide e o documento unico mais denso (160KB, 50+ frameworks)
